overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage depicting a high-speed night drive through the foggy Badlands desert. The scene transitions from a paved road with street lighting to off-road desert terrain, passing industrial installations and neon-lit towers in the distance, culminating in a vehicle chase on dirt paths.

scene_state.functional_zone: paved desert road with tall street lighting

events.description: vehicle turns left off the paved road onto unpaved desert terrain

agents.ego_description: driving along a foggy desert road before steering off onto the dirt

aerodyne vehicle flying overhead with running lights visible through the fog
asphalt road surface with lane markings
blue-green illuminated industrial complex visible through the haze

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy desert road at night, illuminated by tall street lamps. A flying vehicle passes overhead as the camera drives forward along the asphalt before turning left onto the unpaved desert terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial desert outskirts with storage tanks and fencing

events.description: passing large industrial storage tanks and chain-link fences on the right

agents.ego_description: speeding through rough desert terrain past industrial installations

entered.detail: large cylindrical industrial tanks with red safety lights
tall security fencing with barbed wire topping
desert vegetation scattered across the sandy terrain

segments.scene_description: The vehicle traverses off-road desert terrain, passing industrial storage tanks and security fencing. Joshua trees dot the landscape as the flying vehicle moves across the sky to the right, and the distant neon towers of Night City become visible on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert with distant neon-lit towers and mountain backdrop

events.description: entering darker desert area with mountains silhouetted against the foggy sky

agents.ego_description: traversing open desert toward distant illuminated towers

entered.detail: tall towers covered in colorful neon advertisements and holographic displays
dark mountain silhouettes forming the horizon
derelict wooden structure with collapsed roof

segments.scene_description: Driving through the open Badlands desert with towering neon-lit skyscrapers visible in the far distance. The terrain becomes darker as mountains emerge on the right horizon, while an abandoned shelter passes by on the left.

events.description: encountering a truck with illuminated red taillights and beginning to follow it

agents.ego_description: following a truck with red taillights along a desert dirt path

notable_agents.action: truck driving ahead on dirt road with red taillights glowing in the fog

entered.detail: dark truck with bright red brake lights and taillights visible through the fog
large illuminated advertisement sign with red text
derelict structures with broken roofs along the trail

segments.scene_description: The camera catches up to and follows a truck with glowing red taillights along a winding desert trail. The neon towers fade into the distance as the vehicle navigates past abandoned structures, maintaining pursuit of the truck ahead through the foggy night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a lit highway into the desolate, foggy expanse of the Badlands during a nighttime pursuit. It begins on a paved desert road illuminated by tall street lamps, passing under a flying vehicle before turning left onto unpaved terrain. As the camera traverses the off-road landscape, it passes industrial storage tanks and Joshua trees while the distant neon towers of Night City emerge on the horizon. The scene then opens into the wider desert, where the terrain darkens and mountains appear to the right as an abandoned shelter passes by on the left. Finally, the camera closes the gap to follow a truck with glowing red taillights along a winding trail, navigating past abandoned structures as the city lights fade into the foggy night.
